name: Tails OS
description: Amnesic live OS (no trace) Tool: https://tails.boum.org/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #796 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Tails OS output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
